prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类（含理科）最低位次依次约 9422→46667→12868→19063→27014，整体呈大幅后移趋势。2022 年因广西一本投档线暴跌近 4 万位出现异常断档，2023 年回弹至 12868 后再度持续后移，2025 年基准约 27014 名，近 3 年累计后移约 14146 名；该校在广西物理类招生计划 2021–2022 年均为 89 人，2023 年 94 人，2024 年 108 人，2025 年 115 人，2026 年计划 118 人，较 2025 年扩招 3 人（+2.6%），扩招幅度较小，对竞争格局影响有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜排名近年持续上升：2021 年第 53→2022 年第 51→2023 年第 46→2024 年第 50→2025 年第 50→2026 年第 44 名，学校综合实力与认可度稳步提升；2022 年声誉评价为明显负面（广西投档线暴跌近 4 万位、食堂投诉）；2025 年偏负面（全国投档线溃败、黑龙江 389 分录取引发热议）；2026 年偏负面（学校管理/校园安全类舆情，14 条事件以中性为主）。抖音热度总排名第 8（高热），综合热度 585 万+，短视频曝光量高，报考关注度持续升温。历史投档异常信号为高关注，2022 年广西断档及 2025 年全国性位次下滑可能对后续报考心理产生滞后影响。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自 动化等工科专业持续高热推荐，与郑州大学工科专业设置高度契合，推高相关专业组竞争。广西 2026 年物理类考生约 26.9 万（按近年占比估算），较 2025 年增长约 3.3%，考生规模扩大加剧竞争。；郑州大学位于河南，非广西本地高校，在广西招生占比约 2.2%（2025 年），占比稳定，无明显地域偏好影响。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026 年小幅扩招（+3 人）、广西物理类考生增长约 3.3%、学校软科排名上升至第 44 名、抖音高热关注度与偏负面声誉交织，以及工科热门专业持续吸引高分考生，预计 2026 年最低录取位次在 2025 年基准 27014 名基础上继续后移。预测最低位次约 27637 名，区间 27137–28137 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the lowest rankings for Physics Category (including Science) were approximately 9422→46667→12868→19063→27014, showing a significant overall backward trend. In 2022, due to a sharp drop in Guangxi's first-batch admission line by nearly 40,000 positions, an abnormal gap occurred. After rebounding to 12868 in 2023, it continued to move backward, with a baseline of about 27014 in 2025, accumulating a backward shift of about 14146 positions over the past 3 years. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Guangxi was 89 students in 2021–2022, 94 in 2023, 108 in 2024, 115 in 2025, and a planned 118 in 2026, an increase of 3 students (+2.6%) compared to 2025, a relatively small expansion with limited impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 and Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking has been rising in recent years: 53rd in 2021→51st in 2022→46th in 2023→50th in 2024→50th in 2025→44th in 2026, indicating steady improvement in comprehensive strength and recognition. In 2022, reputation evaluation was clearly negative (Guangxi admission line plummeted by nearly 40,000 positions, cafeteria complaints); in 2025, somewhat negative (nationwide admission line collapse, 389-point admission in Heilongjiang sparked discussion); in 2026, somewhat negative (school management/campus safety-related public opinion, 14 events mostly neutral). Douyin heat total ranking 8th (high heat), comprehensive heat 5.85 million+, short video exposure high, application attention continues to heat up. Historical admission anomaly signal is high concern; the 2022 Guangxi gap and 2025 nationwide ranking decline may have a lagging effect on subsequent application psychology.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly recommended, aligning well with Zhengzhou University's engineering offerings, increasing competition in related major groups. In 2026, Guangxi's Physics Category examinees are about 269,000 (estimated based on recent proportions), an increase of about 3.3% compared to 2025, with an expanded candidate pool intensifying competition. Zhengzhou University is located in Henan, not a local Guangxi institution, with a Guangxi enrollment share of about 2.2% (2025), a stable proportion with no significant regional preference influence.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend in historical rankings, the small enrollment expansion in 2026 (+3 students), the approximately 3.3% increase in Guangxi Physics Category examinees, the university's Soft Science ranking rising to 44th, high Douyin attention intertwined with somewhat negative reputation, and popular engineering majors continuing to attract high-scoring students, it is expected that the lowest admission ranking in 2026 will continue to move backward from the 2025 baseline of 27014. Predicted lowest ranking approximately 27637, with a range of 27137–28137.

If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<27137), prioritize Tier 1 popular majors such as Computer Science and Electronic Information; if the ranking is close to the upper limit (>28137), consider Tier 3 majors first to ensure admission.
